notes: The current year 2026 is a PARTIAL year (trials only through the retrieval date), so its count is legitimately short — read its dip as incomplete data, not a real decline.

Bucket(s) 2027 hold genuine future/estimated dates and are flagged 'planned' — kept in the series, not clamped into the current year (which would inflate it) and not dropped (which would break reconciliation) (G-40).

The chart answers the trend question, but the encoding/title should reflect that 2026 is partial and 2027 is planned; as shown, a simple yearly line risks implying a continuous completed series rather than a partially observed/forward-looking timeline.
